def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])

    # adv40 proxy: 40-day rolling mean of volume
    adv40 = rolling_mean(pl.col('volume'), window=40)

    # Left side: rank(open - ts_min(open, 12))  [12.4105 -> 12]
    open_minus_min = pl.col('open') - rolling_min(pl.col('open'), window=12)
    left = rank(open_minus_min).over('date')

    # Right side: Ts_Rank( rank( correlation( sum((H+L)/2, 19), sum(adv40, 19), 13) )^5 , 12 )
    mid_price = (pl.col('high') + pl.col('low')) / 2
    sum_mid = rolling_sum(mid_price, window=19)          # 19.1351 -> 19
    sum_adv40 = rolling_sum(adv40, window=19)            # 19.1351 -> 19
    corr = rolling_corr(sum_mid, sum_adv40, window=13)   # 12.8742 -> 13
    ranked_corr = rank(corr).over('date')
    powered = ranked_corr ** 5
    right = ts_rank(powered, window=12)                 # 11.7584 -> 12

    # Boolean comparison cast to float
    factor = (left < right).cast(pl.Float64)

    return df.select(factor).to_series()
